results.live_executive_summary: Purdue Pharma remains in Chapter 11 with a confirmed $7.4B settlement plan (Nov 2025) requiring Sackler payments over 15 years and dissolution of Purdue into a new public-benefit company (Knoa Pharma); no Sackler family member has faced criminal charges despite two corporate felony guilty pleas (2007, 2020) and documented extraction of ~$11B before bankruptcy. Craig Landau (President & CEO (since June 2017; oversees bankruptcy wind-down toward Knoa Pharma transition)) liability:none No criminal
